headline: Tango Therapeutics (TNGX) Is Down 10.7% After Pipeline Pivot And Board Changes - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Tango Therapeutics, Inc. recently reported first-quarter 2026 results showing a net loss of US$45.51 million, no collaboration revenue after its Gilead research term ended, and the resignations of directors Alexis Borisy and Kanishka Pothula, with Sung Lee appointed Lead Independent Director. Alongside a cash balance of about US$380 million expected to fund operations into 2028, the company is refocusing its oncology pipeline by prioritizing MTAP-deleted selective PRMT5 programs and...
